title: quercus xuanlienensis
intro: Quercus xuanlienensis, also known as Xuanlien oak, is a deciduous tree species native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, derived from its bark, leaves, and roots. The health benefits of Quercus xuanlienensis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, or used in traditional herbal medicine formulations to take advantage of its therapeutic properties.
